arts.sum: Portugal v Denmark, France v Croatia also playing You can email John with your thoughts An earlier score. Georgia played Armenia and won 6-1, a 9-1 aggregate win. We start with the 5pm kick-offs, UK time, and this is a big one for Scotland. Greece are very much improved but Stevie Clarke’s team hold a lead. Now, can they do this? Or are we ready for another vale of tears? Continue reading...

arts.sum: Spain host the Netherlands in the second leg of their UEFA Nations League quarter-final tie tonight. La Roja rescued a result in Rotterdam on Thursday night after Mikel Merino’s stoppage-time equaliser.
